name: Ready Golf Teaching and Club Fitting Center
about: Ready Golf Teaching and Club Fitting Center is an indoor golf facility specializing in expert instruction, custom club fitting, and simulator rental. The venue utilizes Trackman 4 technology for both lessons and simulated play, providing precise ball flight data and swing analysis. Services include one-on-one PGA coaching, personalized club fitting to optimize performance, and rental of climate-controlled simulator bays for year-round practice and play on renowned courses. Appointments are required, with operating hours from 8 AM to 10 PM daily.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade Trackman 4 technology for precise swing analysis
Year-round indoor golf experience in a climate-controlled facility
Custom club fitting service tailored to individual swing characteristics
Ability to play legendary courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews
Expert PGA instruction with over 30 years of experience

simulator_hardware.notes: Latest simulator technology with detailed ball flight tracking and analytics

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own clubs for lessons, fittings, and simulator use. Club rental options are not mentioned.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink services are mentioned, suggesting BYOB is not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulator time is not specified, but Trackman technology typically allows for approximately 1-1.5 hours for a full round depending on the number of players.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific kid-friendly amenities or programs are mentioned, suggesting it's primarily focused on adult serious golfers and instruction.
